When Amazon
Destroys Everything

One violation. One mistake. Your entire business empire crumbles in seconds.

Account Suspensions

Your entire business frozen. Revenue stopped. Dreams paused.

We restore your selling privileges with surgical precision.

Listing Removals

Products vanished overnight. Sales plummeting instantly.

Strategic appeals that get your products back online.

Frozen Funds

Cash flow strangled. Operations at a standstill.

Unlock trapped capital and restore financial freedom.

System Activated

The Reinstatement
Protocol

Four precision steps. Zero room for failure. Your business returns stronger.

STEP 01

Analyze Situation

You submit docs

Our team analyzes every detail of your suspension with forensic precision.

Account history, violation patterns, policy interpretations, insider knowledge

STEP 02

Write Appeal

We write the appeal

Appeals written by former Amazon employees who know the system inside out.

Psychological triggers, policy loopholes, decision-maker psychology

STEP 03

Internal Escalation

We escalate internally

Direct pipeline to senior Amazon decision makers who can override bot decisions.

Executive contacts, internal advocates, priority queue placement

STEP 04

Account Reactivated

You get reinstated

Your account restored, funds released, business resurrected from the dead.

Full privileges, clean record, stronger than before

Our Specialties

Our Clients

Every seller type. Every suspension reason. Every impossible case.

FBA Sellers

Inventory Issues

FBA sellers face unique challenges with inventory compliance, product authenticity verification, and Amazon's strict fulfillment standards that can trigger sudden account suspensions.

Common Problems

  • Inbound shipment violations and labeling issues
  • Product authenticity challenges with brand registry
  • Inventory performance index penalties
  • FBA fee disputes and stranded inventory problems

Our Solutions

  • Comprehensive FBA compliance audit and correction
  • Brand registry documentation and verification process
  • Inventory optimization strategies and performance recovery
  • Direct Amazon Seller Performance team escalation

Wholesale Sellers

Bulk Distribution

Wholesale sellers managing large inventories face complex compliance issues, supplier verification challenges, and bulk listing suspensions that can devastate their entire operation.

Common Problems

  • Supplier authenticity and documentation challenges
  • Bulk listing violations and catalog compliance issues
  • Large-scale inventory management and compliance tracking
  • Multi-brand authorization and gating requirements

Our Solutions

  • Supplier verification and documentation systems
  • Bulk appeal strategies and compliance optimization
  • Automated compliance monitoring and prevention tools
  • Strategic supplier relationship management guidance

High-Volume Sellers

Enterprise Solutions

High-volume sellers with complex operations face sophisticated compliance challenges, multi-account management issues, and enterprise-level suspension scenarios requiring advanced resolution strategies.

Common Problems

  • Multi-account compliance and risk management
  • High-volume listing optimization and automation challenges
  • Complex performance metrics and enterprise-level penalties
  • Brand protection and intellectual property enforcement

Our Solutions

  • Enterprise compliance framework development
  • Multi-account risk assessment and protection strategies
  • Advanced performance optimization and automation systems
  • Dedicated enterprise support and escalation channels

Private Label Sellers

Brand Builders

Private label sellers building their own brands face unique challenges with trademark protection, listing hijackers, counterfeit claims, and brand registry complications that threaten their business foundation.

Common Problems

  • Brand registry verification and trademark disputes
  • Listing hijackers and unauthorized sellers
  • Counterfeit and intellectual property violation claims
  • Product quality complaints and review manipulation accusations

Our Solutions

  • Brand registry protection and trademark defense strategies
  • Hijacker removal and listing protection systems
  • IP violation defense and counterfeit claim resolution
  • Quality control documentation and review policy compliance
Our Expertise

Suspension Types We Handle

From account-level suspensions to individual listing issues, we've successfully resolved every type of marketplace suspension.

Amazon Seller Account Suspension

Complete account reinstatement for policy violations

Expert Resolution

Expert Resolution

Dropshipping Suspension

Expert Resolution

IP Deactivation

Expert Resolution

Linked Account Suspension

Multi-account issues and relationship appeals

Expert Resolution

ASIN Suspension

Product listing violations and reactivation

Expert Resolution

MFN Deactivation

Merchant fulfilled network compliance restoration

Expert Resolution

Critical Window Closing

Amazon's internal review cycles operate on tight schedules. Missing this window could delay your reinstatement by weeks. Your competitors are already capturing your market share.
